description_long: This is a pair of eyeglasses with a bold, angular full-rim frame that appears to be made of a sturdy material. The frame is predominantly black and features irregular gold markings distributed across the rims and temples, giving it a distinctive, artistic look. The lenses are clear and have large, hand-drawn characters on them: the left lens displays '10' and the right lens displays 'N', both in a gold color. The temples are straight and relatively thick, extending back in a classic style. The bridge is solid and integrated into the frame, providing a seamless connection between the two lenses. There are no visible nose pads or brand logos, and the overall design is both playful and unconventional.
description: A bold, black full-rim pair of glasses with gold markings and hand-drawn '10' and 'N' on the clear lenses. The frame is thick and angular, with no visible branding.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full frame, clear lenses with '10' and 'N' in gold, and the artistic gold markings on the rims.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the straight, thick temple and the edge of the left lens with the '10' visible.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the inside of the frame and the reversed 'N' and '10' on the lenses, as well as the full length of both temples.
description_view_3: Right side view focusing on the straight right temple and the edge of the right lens with the 'N' visible.
attribute_frame_design: The frame is full-rimmed, angular, and thick, with a rectangular geometry and straight temples. It features irregular, artistic embellishments along the rims and temples, giving it a unique, hand-crafted appearance.
attribute_lens_tint: The lenses are clear and transparent, with no visible tint or coloration, but have large gold hand-drawn characters on each lens.
attribute_bridge_style: The bridge is a solid, integrated type with a straight, robust shape, seamlessly connecting the two lenses without any visible nose pads.
attribute_temple_detailing: The temples are straight, thick, and feature the same irregular gold markings as the frame, with no additional engravings or embellishments.
